_tuning_note: mean_field_scan round 3 U3 regime: gamma_v=3,D_v=0.6 => low spatial diffusion D_x=D_v/gamma_v^2=0.067 so chemotaxis focuses (R_0.5 0.758->0.318 at beta=0.3); sigma_x=0.5,c0=0.05 => S_c activates; alpha_rho=3 self-limits. beta 0.3->0.4 caps mass nearer ~4-6x (U3@beta0.3 gave 10.65x). buffer_mult=20 headroom. K_x=5 (kappa=0.5 damps modes>5).
